name: Suspicious Lnk File Dropped in Startup Folder via Winrar Archive
description: Detects the creation of a .lnk (shortcut) file in the Windows Startup folder, a common persistence technique used by threat actors to ensure malware execution upon user login. This behavior is associated with malware delivery campaigns, including those leveraging CVE-2025-8088 to deploy the Mythic agent.

rules.name: Suspicious Lnk File Dropped in Startup Folder via Winrar Archive

author: Shaun Galura & Gerardo III Jonieca
